related_backend_change: 3f0157a Move SSE generation off async runtime
scope: Exact Llama 3.2 3B Instruct Q8_0 local Mac streaming-responsiveness smoke only.
privacy: Public compact artifact; raw local model paths, hostnames, and operator-only staging details are redacted.
finding: The local Mac 3B Q8_0 user-visible wait remains dominated by long first-content latency, but the patched streaming path can emit an immediate role/progress chunk and keep health responsive during dense generation.
non_claims: Does not improve or close the approximately 253.5 second first-content latency finding.
Does not promote production throughput or portability support.
Does not widen support to neighboring Llama rows, other quants, model-native/larger context, arbitrary templates, or broad Llama-family behavior.
